caption: A man with dark hair, wearing a light-colored collared shirt under a dark blazer, is speaking at an event. He is seated in front of a white background featuring logos for "theCUBE" and "BigDataSV" alongside blue cubic graphics and the hashtag "#BigDataSV". A blue on-screen graphic identifies him as "JOHN FURRIER | @furrier", adding that he is the "Founder" of "SiliconANGLE". To his side, a laptop and a clear plastic water bottle are visible. Throughout the sequence, the man is captured in mid-conversation, gesturing with his hands and shifting his facial expressions as he speaks. In the initial frames, he looks slightly off-camera with a focused expression, and by the final frames, he is actively gesturing with his right hand while speaking. A small logo for "INFO-OBJECTS" is also visible on the far left of the lower third graphic.
